name: y2k-neon
hypothesis: Y2K neon overlay (pink/cyan diagonal wash + 4px scan-lines + violet corner vignette + sweeping chromatic-aberration band) creates a thumb-stop palette signature on TikTok/Reels 2026 feeds without altering gameplay, hook, or endcard structure.

diff_from_baseline.scope: palette only — overlay applied at top of _paintOverlay, gated to skip endcard and forcewin phases so Sami's juice stays intact.
